root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's a trial you've faced... and will face again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's a trial you've faced... and will face again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the Qliphoth Demon Lord will use any means to reach its end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the Qliphoth Demon Lord will use any means to reach its end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the Qliphoth Demon Lord will use any means to reach its end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it means breaking the rules of the game...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it means breaking the rules of the game...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it means breaking the rules of the game...
